description: Implement candle-close exit system with swing high/low SL, $5 profit breakeven at $1, and advanced M1 reversal detection for early loss cutting.
steps: 1. In config.py: Remove old TRAIL_TIERS and MAX_HOLD_SECONDS. Add new exit-related config: CANDLE_CLOSE_EXIT=True, NO_TP=True, SWING_SL_LOOKBACK=10 (bars to look back for swing hi/lo), SWING_SL_MIN_DISTANCE=0.50 (minimum SL distance from entry), BREAKEVEN_PROFIT_THRESHOLD=5.00 (profit $ to trigger BE move), BREAKEVEN_LOCK_AMOUNT=1.00 ($ profit locked at BE), REVERSAL_DETECTION_ENABLED=True, REVERSAL_CANDLE_BODY_MIN=0.40 (minimum candle body size $), REVERSAL_CANDLE_BODY_RATIO=0.70 (body must be >= 70% of candle range), REVERSAL_ATR_MULT=1.5 (candle must be >= 1.5x recent ATR), REVERSAL_VOLUME_SPIKE=1.5 (volume must be 1.5x average - if available), MAX_POSITIONS=1 (only 1 trade at a time since we close at candle close).

2. Rewrite trailing_stop.py completely. Replace the old 4-tier system with a new CandleCloseManager class that: (a) Tracks an active position (direction, entry_price, ticket, entry_time). (b) On each tick, checks if a new M1 candle has closed (minute changed). When candle closes, fires CLOSE_FULL exit signal. (c) Before candle close, checks the $5 profit breakeven: if profit >= $5, writes MODIFY_SL to move SL to entry + $1 (BUY) or entry - $1 (SELL). (d) Implements early reversal detection: checks if the current forming candle is a high-momentum reversal against the trade. Criteria: large body (>= REVERSAL_CANDLE_BODY_MIN), body ratio (>= REVERSAL_CANDLE_BODY_RATIO), candle range >= REVERSAL_ATR_MULT * recent ATR average. If detected, fires early CLOSE_FULL. (e) Still runs on 100ms interval like old trailing stop.

3. Create a new file swing_levels.py with function `compute_swing_sl(prices_df, direction, entry_price) -> float` that finds the last obvious swing high (for SELL SL) or swing low (for BUY SL) from recent M1 bars. Uses a simple swing detection: a bar whose High is higher than N bars before and after (swing high), or Low lower than N bars before and after (swing low). Returns the swing level as the SL price. If no swing found within lookback, uses SWING_SL_MIN_DISTANCE from entry as fallback.

4. In main.py: Replace TrailingStopManager usage (already removed) with integration of the new candle close system. After firing a signal, the system should: compute swing SL from recent bars, include the SL in the signal (sl_pips field converted to $ distance), and start tracking for candle close exit. Change MAX_POSITIONS to 1 (one trade at a time, close at candle close then re-enter). Remove scale-in logic (no multiple positions - one entry per candle cycle).

5. In main.py: After a candle close exit, the system should immediately look for next entry opportunity in the new candle (within EMA range). The flow becomes: entry -> wait for candle close -> exit -> immediate re-evaluation for next entry.

6. In Include/NeuroX_Position.mqh: Completely rewrite ManageOpenPositions(). Remove the 4-tier progressive trailing. New logic: (a) Check if profit >= $5: if yes and SL not already at BE, move SL to entry + $1 (BUY) or entry - $1 (SELL). (b) The actual candle-close exit will be triggered by Python writing exit signals. The EA still handles the SL/breakeven move on every tick for speed. (c) Keep emergency close logic. (d) Remove time-based exit and momentum reversal exit (Python handles these now). (e) Keep DetectBrokerClosedPositions() for SL hits.
7. In the signal creation in main.py: Set tp_pips to 0 (no TP) and sl_pips to the swing high/low distance. Update create_signal() accordingly.
8. In Include/NeuroX_Execution.mqh: When tp_pips is 0, set TP=0 on the order (no take profit). Ensure CalculateTP returns 0 when signal has tp_pips=0.
9. Create tests/test_candle_close.py testing the new CandleCloseManager: test candle close detection, test $5 BE trigger, test reversal detection logic, test swing SL computation.
10. Create tests/test_swing_levels.py testing swing level detection from price data.
acceptance_criteria: Trades close at M1 candle close (when minute changes), not on TP
No TP is set on orders (tp_pips=0)
SL is placed at last swing high/low
When profit reaches $5, SL moves to entry + $1 for breakeven lock
High-momentum reversal candles against the trade trigger early exit
Only 1 position at a time (close at candle close, then re-enter)
Existing tests still pass (with adjustments for new logic)
